turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I need an urgent appointment. My father is having chest discomfort since morning.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand the urgency. For chest discomfort we strongly recommend coming in as soon as possible. Is he able to travel?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes, yes he can. We can come right now actually.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please come directly to the emergency department. Dr. Suresh Nair, our cardiologist, is in today and can see him. May I have your name for the records?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Vivek Joshi. My father's name is Dattatray Joshi.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you Vivek. Please bring any previous medical records or prescriptions. We'll have the team ready. Come straight to emergency reception.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay, we're on our way. Thank you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please hurry. We'll be expecting you. Take care.
